artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 116 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket ERROR count per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket, read from logs/app.log" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Stack direction="vertical" gap="md">
    <Text variant="body">The application log spans one hour (09:00–10:00) and contains 22 ERROR lines out of 100 total lines. Errors are clustered mid-window, peaking at 09:30 with 11 occurrences.</Text>
    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
    <Text variant="caption">Bucket start times are labelled on the x-axis (09:00, 09:10, 09:20, 09:30, 09:40, 09:50); each bar counts the ERROR lines logged within that 10-minute window.</Text>
  </Stack>
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk

    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
    <Text variant="caption">Bucket start times are labelled on the x-axis (09:00, 09:10, 09:20, 09:30, 09:40, 09:50); each bar counts the ERROR lines logged within that 10-minute window.</Text>

</Card>
